summary: Iteration 10 — Frontend-only validation of the sitewide elegance/styling pass on the PHP UCODE SOFTTECH site at https://software-staging.preview.emergentagent.com. Comprehensive regression of homepage, shop, category, blog, cart, product, mega menu, dark mode, FAQ accordion, static pages, and mobile (390px). ALL 11 requested test scenarios PASS, including the previously-failing 'Edition Professional Plus / Home and Student blurred on Office Home 2024 Mac' from iteration_9 — both chips now correctly render with class 'btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary variant-blur'. Specifically verified: (1) Homepage renders all sections (hero, trust strip, Ask AI teaser, welcome-back strip, trust badges, Best Sellers, How It Works, FAQ, etc.) with 0 PHP Warning/Notice/Fatal errors; .reveal scroll-animation IIFE is wired and IntersectionObserver adds .in class on scroll (verified 16/67 reveal elements gained .in after scrolling to y=800). (2) Shop page (/shop.php) shows new .page-head band with breadcrumb 'Home / Shop', data-testid='page-head-title' = 'All Products'. (3) Category page (/category.php?slug=office-2024-pc) shows data-testid='category-title' = 'Office 2024 for PC Products', breadcrumb 'Home / Office 2024 for PC', exactly 4 products, sort=price_asc returns prices [126.99, 209.99, 219.99, 228.99] correctly ascending. (4) Blog page (/blog.php) shows page-head title 'Tips & Guides' + 4 post cards. (5) Product /product.php?slug=microsoft-office-home-2024-mac: Version 2024 chip is ACTIVE (class includes btn-primary), Edition 'Professional Plus' and 'Home and Student' are BLURRED (class includes variant-blur — iter_9 bug is FIXED), OS Mac is ACTIVE / OS PC is clickable (<a> tag with btn-outline-secondary). (6) Add-to-Cart (data-testid='pd-add-to-cart') increments cart badge from 0 → 1 and /cart.php shows page-head 'Shopping Cart' + Order Summary + Total. (7) Mega menu: nav-microsoft hover opens full-width .mega menu with 4 columns, 14 menu-* and 30 mega-product-* links; clicking [data-testid='menu-office-2024-pc'] navigates to category.php?slug=office-2024-pc; clicking first [data-testid^='mega-product-'] navigates to corresponding product.php. (8) Dark-mode toggle (data-testid='theme-toggle') flips html[data-bs-theme] light → dark; .bg-soft sections correctly switch to rgb(11,18,34) (defined in style.css line 21). (9) FAQ accordion on homepage expands when clicked (aria-expanded: null → true after click — separated rounded style via .accordion-item border-radius). (10) Static pages: /page.php?slug=contact-us and /login.php both load with new Plus Jakarta Sans font, no layout break, 0 PHP errors. (11) Eyebrow class applied (5 .eyebrow elements on home) and .bg-soft alternating section backgrounds (6 .bg-soft sections on home). ONE MINOR UI BUG found: homepage at 390px viewport has horizontal overflow (documentElement.scrollWidth > clientWidth, body width = 402px > viewport 390); root causes are (a) the .row.align-items-center.g-5 hero block extends from x=-12 to x=402 (Bootstrap g-5 negative margins not contained), and (b) the .cat-chip.flex-shrink-0 'Browse' category chip row extends to x=1653 because the wrapping container does not have overflow-x:hidden. Shop, category, blog pages at 390px have NO overflow.

ui_bugs.issue: Horizontal scroll on the page (documentElement.scrollWidth=402 > clientWidth=390). Two contributors: (1) hero .row.g-5 has negative gutter margins extending to x=-12 and x=402; (2) the .cat-chip.flex-shrink-0 'Browse' category chip row inside the welcome-back / browse strip extends to x=1653, but the parent has no overflow-x:hidden — so it scrolls the whole page horizontally instead of being a contained scrollable chip carousel. Fix: wrap the cat-chip row in a div with class 'overflow-x-auto' (or set overflow:hidden on its parent) and ensure the hero .row uses .gx-0 or .gx-3 on mobile (or wrap in .overflow-hidden). Shop, category, blog, cart pages at 390px do NOT overflow, so the bug is isolated to index.php.

issues: Page-level horizontal scroll caused by un-contained chip row + hero gutters — minor polish issue, the page itself is still readable.

action_items: Add `overflow-x: hidden` (or wrap in `.overflow-x-auto`) to the parent of the .cat-chip.flex-shrink-0 row on index.php so the horizontal chip carousel doesn't overflow the body on 390px viewport.
Consider adding `.overflow-hidden` to the .hero container (or using `.gx-0` / smaller gutters on xs) to neutralize the 12px g-5 negative margin bleed.

(Optional) Confirm checkout.php still renders correctly end-to-end with an item in cart — sub-agent could not reproducibly click checkout (cart session was empty in second probe); previous iterations validated this works. Main agent can self-verify by adding an item and clicking checkout.
critical_code_review_comments: Iteration 9 bug (Edition variant-blur on Office Home 2024 Mac) is FIXED — both Professional Plus and Home and Student chips now carry the .variant-blur class as required. render_variant_row() in functions.php now correctly handles cross-axis (OS+year) edition availability.

Active chip styling (iter 9 UX gap) is FIXED — Version 2024 / Edition Professional Plus / OS PC on /product.php?slug=microsoft-office-2024-professional-plus-windows all render as <span class='btn btn-sm btn-primary'> (filled blue) so the current selection is now visually obvious — confirmed via screenshot.

render_page_head() helper is consistently applied across shop / category / blog / cart with proper breadcrumb and data-testid='page-head-title' (and 'category-title' on category). Subtitle, breadcrumb, and gradient .page-head styling all working.

scroll-reveal IIFE in main.js works: 16/67 .reveal elements gained .in class after scrolling to y=800, and elements above the fold are revealed immediately — also respects prefers-reduced-motion via the CSS @media block at style.css L78-80.
Dark mode coverage is complete: .bg-soft, .page-head, .hero, .trustbar, .product-img-wrap all have dark-variant rules in style.css and switch correctly when data-bs-theme=dark.
Google Fonts Plus Jakarta Sans is loading (header.php L13-18) and applied via body in style.css L12.
Zero PHP Warning/Notice/Fatal/Parse errors across 8 distinct pages visited (home, shop, category, blog, product x2, cart, page, login).

No data-testid attributes are missing on any flow exercised in the spec (page-head-title, category-title, pd-add-to-cart, cart-button, theme-toggle, nav-microsoft, menu-*, mega-product-*, version-option-*, edition-option-*, os-option-*, hero-shop-now, ask-ai-teaser all verified).

success_rate.frontend: ~98% — 11/11 spec scenarios pass; 1 minor mobile-only UI overflow on homepage is the only finding

test_credentials: Not needed — all flows tested as guest. /app/memory/test_credentials.md not opened this run.
seed_data_creation: Added 1 line item (Office Home 2024 Mac) and later (Windows 11 Home) to fresh guest cart sessions during regression — no checkout/payment performed, no DB rows created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Elegance pass is solid. The only outstanding item is a mobile-only horizontal overflow on index.php caused by the .cat-chip carousel row not being clipped + hero row g-5 margins. Other pages are fine at 390px. Iter 9 blurred-edition bug is fully fixed. Active chip styling is in place. If main agent fixes the mobile overflow, just re-check at 390px viewport: `document.documentElement.scrollWidth === document.documentElement.clientWidth` should be true on index.php.
rca of the issue: Homepage mobile horizontal overflow — Reproduction: open https://software-staging.preview.emergentagent.com/ on 390x844 viewport. Observe document.documentElement.scrollWidth=402 vs clientWidth=390 (= 12px overflow). RCA: two compounding causes — (a) Bootstrap .row.g-5 applies negative margin-left/-right of ~12px which normally is contained by the parent .container, but on the hero the parent is a non-container or has no overflow-clip on xs; (b) more importantly, the 'Browse' chip strip uses .cat-chip.flex-shrink-0 elements totalling ~1650px wide in a parent without overflow-x:hidden / overflow-x:auto, so the entire body widens to accommodate them. Mitigation: wrap the cat-chip row in `<div class='d-flex overflow-x-auto gap-2'>` (replacing the existing wrapper, if any) so the row scrolls horizontally INSIDE its container rather than expanding the body width. Also consider `.overflow-hidden` on .hero. Verified that shop/category/blog/cart at 390px do NOT exhibit this, isolating the fix to index.php.
